name: Natural In Drawer Knife Organizer Yellow - Brightroom™: Knife Storage Drawer Insert, Holder for Kitchen
description:
Keep your knives organized with this Bamboo In-Drawer Knife Organizer from Brightroom™. This bamboo knife organizer features 13 slots to safely store different knives while keeping their sharp edges hidden to prevent accidental nicks. Compact in size and featuring a non-clunky design, it easily fits most kitchen drawers, while the natural wooden finish adds farmhouse-style charm to your kitchen decor.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
